title: The Khadi and Village Industries Commission Act, 1956
full_text: The Khadi and Village Industries Commission Act, 1956 खादी और ग्रामोद्योग आयोग अधिनियम, 1956 Rules Regulations Notifications Orders Circulars Ordinance Statutes SectionsScheduleAnnexureAppendixFormsActdetails Act ID: 195661 Act Number: 61 Enactment Date: 1956-09-25 Act Year: 1956 Short Title: The Khadi and Village Industries Commission Act, 1956 Hindi Title: खादी और ग्रामोद्योग आयोग अधिनियम, 1956 Long Title: An Act to provide for the establishment of a Commission for the development of Khadi and Village Industries and for matters connected therewith. Ministry: Ministry of Micro, Small and Medium Enterprises Enforcement Date: 25-09-1956 Schedule 1. THE SCHEDULE. Order Appendix Forms TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles Show all section The Khadi and Village Industries Commission Act, 1956 CHAPTER I PRELIMINARY CHAPER II THE KHADI AND VILLAGE INDUSTRIES COMMISSION CHAPTER III FUNCTIONS OF THE COMMISSION CHAPTER IV FINANCE, ACCOUNTS, AUDIT AND REPORTS CHAPTER V MISCELLANEOUS Section 1. Short title and extent. Show Related Subordinates Section 2. Definitions. Section 3. Power to add to the Schedule. Section 4. Establishment and constitution of the Commission. Show Related Subordinates Section 5. Powers and functions of the Chief Executive Officer. Section 5A. Powers and functions of the Financial Adviser. Section 6. Disqualifications for membership of the Commission. Section 6A. Removal of Chairman, Member, etc., from the Commission. Section 7. Resignation of office by member. Section 8. Vacancies, etc., not to invalidate acts and proceedings of the Commission. Section 9. Temporary association of persons with the Commission for particular purposes. Show Related Subordinates Section 10. Constitution of the Board. Show Related Subordinates Section 11. Commission to consult the Board. Section 12. Meetings of the Commission. Section 12A. Zonal Committee. Section 13. Term of office and conditions of service of the chairman and other members. Section 14. Officers and servants of the Commission. Show Related Subordinates Section 15. Functions of the Commission. Show Related Subordinates Section 16. Power of Central Government to give directions. Section 17. Payment to the Commission. Section 17A. Commission to receive gifts, grants, etc. Section 18. Funds of the Commission. Section 19. Power of the Commission to spend. Section 19A. Standing Finance Committees. Section 19B. Recovery of monies due to the Commission as arrears of land-revenue. Show Related Subordinates Section 20. Budget. Section 21. Borrowing of money. Section 22. Transfer of liabilities and obligations to the Commission. Section 23. Accounts and audit. Section 24. Returns and reports. Section 24A. Exemption from liability to pay income-tax. Section 25. Dissolution of the Commission. Show Related Subordinates Section 26. Power to make rules. Show Related Subordinates Section 27. Power to make regulations. Show Related Subordinates Section 28. Rules and Regulations to be laid before Parliament. Schedule 1. THE SCHEDULE.
